name: Thai Cucumber
recipeIngredient: 1 small Onion, sliced into thin lengthwise pieces
1 Red chile pepper, seeded and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Julienne the cucumber using a mandolin.
2. In a deep bowl, stir together the vinegar, sugar, salt, and white pepper until well blended.
3. Peel the onion and red chile pepper; slice them into thin lengthwise pieces.
4. Add the remaining ingredients (except peanuts) to the marinade and toss with the cucumbers.
5. Serve immediately or cover and chill for no longer than 2 hours.
6. Top with whole or chopped peanuts just before serving.
Makes 1 cup.
